items.name: URBAN X Y2K Boxy Flame Shirt
items.description:
Sleek and modern boxy-fit T-shirt designed for a bold streetwear look. Featuring clean flame-inspired graphics on a deep black base, this piece blends minimalism with edge. Perfect for casual outfits, avatar styling, and standing out in any experience.

Made for those who like simple yet striking fashion. Pair it with your favorite accessories for a complete urban vibe.
